prompt:
A birdhouse panel set laid out neatly on a workbench: front and back panels, side walls, roof pieces, and a floor piece arranged like a kit, with a small clamp and wood glue bottle shape in soft focus (no branding). The entrance-hole panel is clearly visible, indicating the final form.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a clean near-future workshop aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, tidy layout, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Compose so the pre-cut panels are the crisp focal point and read as “ready to assemble.”
